nodes.context: A surf culture gang based in Maroubra, Sydney, involved in violence and alleged links to organized crime.
A surf riders group associated with the Bra Boys.
A bikie gang with many Lebanese members, involved in peace talks with Bra Boys after the 2005 Cronulla riots.

edges.evidence_quote: The group is often linked with the North Maroubra Surf Riders (NMSR), with which a number of its members are associated.
edges.context: Bra Boys members are associated with the North Maroubra Surf Riders.

edges.evidence_quote: Afterwards the Abberton brothers then held a joint media conference with members the Comanchero Motorcycle Club (a bikie gang , who include many Lebanese as their members) to help ease tensions, declaring peace.
edges.context: Bra Boys and Comanchero Motorcycle Club held a joint media conference to declare peace after the 2005 Cronulla riots.
